title: Cost-Effectiveness Analysis of Durvalumab in Limited-Stage Small Cell Lung Cancer in the United States.
abstract: Small cell lung cancer (SCLC) is an aggressive neuroendocrine malignancy characterized by poor prognosis. The ADRIATIC trial demonstrated significant survival benefits with durvalumab as maintenance therapy for limited-stage SCLC (LS-SCLC). However, the high cost of durvalumab necessitates an evaluation of its cost-effectiveness.
